Name: Enterprise Relocation Package
Description: Full-service enterprise remote work relocation package including apartment sourcing, flight booking, and home-office equipment stipend management.

Name: Standard Relocation Package
Description: Standard relocation package: apartment sourcing, economy flight booking, home-office equipment stipend management

Name: Equipment Stipend Management
Description: Home-office equipment procurement and stipend management fee

Name: Premium Relocation Package
Description: Premium relocation package: priority apartment sourcing (furnished), business class flight, full home-office setup, dedicated coordinator, 30-day post-move support

Name: Rush Coordination Surcharge
Description: Expedited coordination surcharge for rush relocation with 5-day turnaround

Name: Vehicle Shipping Add-On
Description: Third-party auto transport coordination via Road Runner Auto Transport — enclosed carrier, door-to-door

Name: Apartment Sourcing
Description: Apartment sourcing and lease coordination per relocating employee

Name: Flight Booking
Description: Flight booking coordination fee per relocating employee

Name: Moving Coordination
Description: Moving vendor coordination and logistics management per relocating employee

Name: Stipend Platform Monthly Fee
Description: Monthly access fee for MoveOps stipend management platform

Name: International Customs Broker Surcharge
Description: TN visa documentation support and Canadian customs broker engagement (BorderEase Customs) for cross-border personal effects declaration (BSF186)

Name: Cold-Chain Specialized Freight Surcharge
Description: Specialized temperature-controlled freight via Swift Relocations for cryogenic lab equipment requiring sustained -20°C transport (split-vendor arrangement)

Name: Temporary Storage Fee
Description: Short-term household goods storage at destination city facility (up to 2 weeks) for lease gap situations

Name: Pet Relocation Coordination Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for coordinating pet-friendly housing, ESA documentation, and pet logistics during employee relocation.

Name: Split-Shipment Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for relocations requiring split-shipment logistics (multiple trucks or vendor legs) due to exceeding standard single-truck weight/volume limits.

Name: ADA Housing Sourcing Premium
Description: Premium for sourcing ADA-accessible housing with specific accessibility requirements (roll-in shower, wide doorways, elevator/ground-floor access).

Name: Hazmat Transport Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for DOT-certified hazardous materials transport. Covers specialized carrier, climate-controlled vehicle, and regulatory compliance documentation.

Name: Interim Hazmat Storage
Description: DOT-compliant temperature-controlled interim storage facility for hazardous materials. Billed per day.

Name: Overweight/Specialty Equipment Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for overweight or specialty equipment requiring custom crating, flatbed transport, and freight elevator coordination at destination.

Name: Stipend Platform Monthly Fee
Description: Monthly fee for home-office equipment stipend platform access, administration, and expense processing.

Name: Walkup Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for moves from upper-floor walkup buildings with no elevator access. Covers additional crew time, equipment, and furniture disassembly/reassembly.

Name: Custom Crating & Vibration-Dampened Packaging
Description: Specialty crating and vibration-dampened packaging for precision equipment and industrial machinery. Includes custom foam inserts and anti-static wrapping.

Name: Climate-Controlled Freight Surcharge
Description: Surcharge for climate-controlled freight transport of temperature-sensitive equipment. Maintains specified temperature range during transit.

Name: Interim Storage
Description: Daily rate for interim storage when there is a gap between origin lease end and destination lease start. Climate-controlled or standard depending on contents.

Name: Cargo Insurance Rider
Description: Supplemental cargo insurance rider for high-value shipments. Rate based on declared equipment value.

Name: Chain-of-Custody Security Protocol
Description: Chain-of-custody security protocol for IT equipment transport. Includes signed custody log, GPS tracking coordination, and client security escort supervision. PROVISIONAL PRICING -- first-time service, estimate based on comparable secure logistics rates.

Name: Specialty Piano Moving
Description: Specialty piano moving subcontractor coordination. Includes climate-controlled transport and professional tuning at destination. Subcontractor vendor TBD.

Name: Early Lease Termination Negotiation
Description: Early lease termination negotiation service. Non-standard MoveOps offering -- scope and pricing pending client confirmation.

Name: Temporary Corporate Housing
Description: Furnished temporary corporate housing sourced through vendor partners. Billed per week. Includes weekly housekeeping, Wi-Fi, and full kitchen.

Name: Specialty Equipment Crating
Description: Custom anti-static or climate-controlled crating for sensitive electronics, calibrated instruments, or fragile equipment. Per-unit pricing.

Name: White-Glove Service Premium
Description: Executive-tier white-glove relocation premium. Includes dedicated coordinator, priority scheduling, full packing and unpacking service, furniture disassembly and reassembly, and enhanced communication cadence.
